main.description: A registered drain or expenditure of Tass. 'To enervate' literally means to draw the sinew (the nerve, the current-carrying conduit) out of a node — to tap the tass and withdraw its current. Each enervate reduces the available quintessence in the referenced tassilize record.

tass.description: AT-URI of the at.telluri.act.tassilize record being drained

purpose.description: Optional: what the withdrawn quintessence was spent on
